item.title: Bernadette Turns 21: A Love Letter to My Oldest Possum
item.description: I know that I run a possum farm, and that farms are supposed to be professional operations, and that farmers are not supposed to weep openly over a possum’s birthday cake. But Bernadette turns 21 today, and I am weeping openly over her possum birthday cake, and I do not apologize. Who Is Bernadette Bernadette is the possum who started everything. I’ve told the story before — she climbed onto my porch railing in 2003, stared at me with the wisdom of an ancient creature, ate half my sandwich, and then lay down next to me and slept.

item.title: 17 Possum Facts That Will Change Your Entire Life
item.description: Every day, people walk around not knowing enough about possums. This is a crime against knowledge. I, Papi Possum, am here to fix this. Here are 17 possum facts that I personally guarantee will change your life, your perspective, and possibly your career trajectory. 1. Possums are the only marsupials native to North America. That means while Australia is out there bragging about kangaroos and koalas, America has been sitting on this incredible marsupial the entire time and nobody told anybody.

item.title: Welcome to Possum Farm — An Introduction From Papi
item.description: Hello. I am Papi Possum. You found my website. This is either a sign of great intelligence on your part, or you got here by accident. Either way, welcome. The possums and I are glad you are here. I started this farm in 2003. At the time, people told me I was crazy. They said, “Papi, you can’t just start a possum farm.” They said, “Papi, that’s not a real business.

item.title: Adopt-A-Possum Certificate
item.description: Have you ever wanted a possum of your own but lack the 40 acres, the emotional fortitude, and the specific lifestyle that possum ownership requires? We have the solution. Adopt-A-Possum is Possum Farm’s symbolic adoption program. For a one-time fee, you receive: What You Get Immediate delivery: A beautiful, officially certified Possum Farm Adoption Certificate with your name and your possum’s name in fancy lettering Your possum’s official biography (a full-page portrait of their personality, habits, and opinions) A 5x7 photograph of your possum doing possum things Ongoing (digital, monthly):

item.title: Official Possum Facts Poster
item.description: You know possum facts. Now make sure everyone who enters your home, office, or dentist waiting room also knows possum facts. The Official Possum Farm Possum Facts Poster is a 12-panel educational masterpiece designed by Papi Possum and formatted by his neighbor who has a computer. Featuring: Top 12 possum facts, curated personally by Papi Vintage scientific illustration style drawings of possums doing possum things A map of possum territory (it’s most of North America, they’ve been busy) A portrait of Bernadette in the corner because she is an icon Papi’s signature, signed by Papi Printed on heavy matte paper using archival inks that will outlast most furniture and probably several political administrations.

item.title: Papi's Signature Dad Hat
item.description: Papi Possum wears this hat every day. He has worn this hat to feed the possums, to philosophical debates with himself at 3am, to the one time he accidentally went to a city council meeting thinking it was a possum welfare discussion (it was not, but he made his points regardless). Now you can wear the exact same hat. The Papi Possum Signature Dad Hat features: Unstructured low-profile crown (the possum farmer’s silhouette) Embroidered “PAPI” on the front in the official Possum Farm typeface Small possum emblem on the left side (Bernadette’s profile, technically) Adjustable metal buckle strap in the back A small hidden interior tag that reads: “Play dead if necessary” Available in Midnight Black, Fog Gray, and Moss Green (Papi calls it “the forest at 2am color” and we kept that description in the catalogue).

item.title: Play Dead Hoodie
item.description: We’ve all been there. The party is too loud. The group chat is too active. Your extended family has opinions about your life choices. You need a way out. The Play Dead Hoodie is that way out. Pull this hoodie on, pull the drawstring, and disappear like a possum who has correctly assessed the situation and chosen the sensible option. The soft fleece lining creates an interior environment that is, frankly, better than whatever is happening outside.

item.title: Possum Farm Classic Tee
item.description: The Original Possum Farm Classic Tee — the garment that will define your personality for years to come. Whether you’re at the farmers market, a formal dinner, or standing in a field at 3am for reasons you’d rather not explain, this shirt says everything words cannot. Front: “POSSUM FARM” in glorious arc lettering above a vintage-style illustration of a possum that looks simultaneously regal and deeply suspicious. Back: “EST. 2003 — PLAY DEAD, LIVE FREE” in smaller text that rewards people who look too closely.

item.title: Possum Farm Enamel Pin Set
item.description: Small objects. Big possum energy. The Possum Farm Enamel Pin Set features six hard enamel pins, each depicting a possum in a different life situation. Collect them all. Trade with friends. Lose one in a couch cushion and find it six months later and feel a surge of joy. The Collection 🦝 “Playing Dead” — A possum lying peacefully on its back, one tiny paw raised. Gold metal backing. The most popular pin by a significant margin.

item.title: The Bernadette Mug
